---
title : "Choosing Your Workflow Applications"
date : "2011-01-01"
author : ["Kieran Healy"]
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "The Political Methodologist, 18(2) 9--18 "
publication_short : "The Political Methodologist, 18(2) 9--18 "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Kieran Healy (2011). *Choosing Your Workflow Applications*. The Political Methodologist, 18(2) 9--18 

:::
